title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Mar 27, 2026
summary: Added five new timeline entries covering the post-Super Bowl streaming surge (Feb 9), the Tokyo Spotify Japan debut on March 7 during the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour, the Adidas x Bad Bunny BadBo 1.0 sneaker global registration opening on March 24, and a Variety report of Bad Bunny being eyed for a supporting role in Tom Hanks' baseball film 'The Comebacker.' The discography/political section was expanded with Lady Gaga and Ricky Martin, both Super Bowl LX halftime surprise guests. Daily event files were created for March 24 and March 27.
